ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A message sent in the live chat during a video.

videoId.description: The ID of the video the chat belongs to.

userId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userAvatar.description: The avatar URL of the user.

/videos/{videoId}/chat.description: Collection of chat messages for a specific video.
